---
name: Access change record
about: Record requested repository or source-control access changes.
title: "[Access] "
labels: []
assignees: ""
---

## Requested Change

Describe the requested access addition, removal, or permission update.

## Account or Role

Use the confirmed CoriTech-controlled account, team, or role name. Use a clear
placeholder if the identity is not yet confirmed.

## Approval

- Requested by:
- Approved by:
- Date:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Access level is least-privilege for the task.
- [ ] CoriTech retains primary admin control.
- [ ] Backup admin access remains intact.
- [ ] Evidence of the change is recorded for due diligence.
